Title: Creed Aventus
Body (HTML):
The legendary king of fragrances that has defined masculine sophistication for over a decade. A fruity, smoky masterpiece opening with blackcurrant and Italian bergamot, evolving into birch and Moroccan jasmine, settling into musk and oakmoss.

Top Notes: Blackcurrant, Italian Bergamot, Apple, Pineapple
Heart Notes: Birch, Moroccan Jasmine, Patchouli
Base Notes: Musk, Oakmoss, Ambergris, Vanilla
Tags: fruity, smoky, masculine, bestseller, signature, season:spring, season:fall, origin:france, event:office, event:date-night

Title: Maison Francis Kurkdjian Baccarat Rouge 540
Body (HTML):
A luminous and sophisticated fragrance that has taken the world by storm. This ethereal scent opens with saffron and jasmine, blending into amberwood and ambergris, creating a crystal-like radiance that glows supernaturally on the skin.

Top Notes: Saffron, Jasmine
Heart Notes: Amberwood, Ambergris
Base Notes: Fir Resin, Cedar
Tags: amber, woody, unisex, bestseller, luxurious, season:fall, season:winter, origin:france, event:date-night, event:evening-out

Title: Parfums de Marly Layton
Body (HTML):
A refined and opulent fragrance bridging classic and modern perfumery. Opening with crisp apple and lavender, moving into geranium and violet, before settling into an addictive base of vanilla, cardamom, and sandalwood. Pure elegant sophistication.

Top Notes: Apple, Lavender, Bergamot
Heart Notes: Jasmine, Violet, Geranium
Base Notes: Vanilla, Cardamom, Sandalwood, Pepper, Guaiac Wood
Tags: sweet, spicy, masculine, elegant, popular, season:fall, season:winter, origin:france, event:date-night, event:evening-out

Title: Tom Ford Ombre Leather
Body (HTML):
A raw yet refined leather fragrance capturing the rugged spirit of the American West. Opening with cardamom and violet leaf, revealing rich leather and jasmine sambac at the heart, grounded by moss, amber, and patchouli. Bold and unforgettable.

Top Notes: Cardamom, Violet Leaf
Heart Notes: Leather, Jasmine Sambac
Base Notes: Moss, Amber, Patchouli
Tags: leather, woody, unisex, bold, evening, season:fall, season:winter, origin:usa, event:date-night, event:evening-out

Title: Parfums de Marly Perseus
Body (HTML):
Named after the heroic Greek demigod, Perseus is a fresh and invigorating masculine scent. Opening with crisp grapefruit and bergamot, flowing into lavender and geranium, settling into musk, amber, and woody notes. Modern masculinity refined.

Top Notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Green Apple
Heart Notes: Lavender, Geranium, Violet Leaf
Base Notes: Musk, Amber, Woody Notes
Tags: fresh, aromatic, masculine, daytime, clean, season:spring, season:summer, origin:france, event:office, event:daytime

Title: Creed Green Irish Tweed
Body (HTML):
A timeless classic epitomizing fresh elegance and sophisticated refinement. Opening with French verbena and Florentine iris, revealing a heart of violet leaves, settling into Mysore sandalwood and ambergris. The scent of rolling green hills.

Top Notes: French Verbena, Lemon Verbena
Heart Notes: Florentine Iris, Violet Leaves
Base Notes: Mysore Sandalwood, Ambergris
Tags: fresh, green, masculine, classic, elegant, season:spring, season:summer, origin:france, event:office, event:daytime

Title: Bond No 9 Lafayette Street
Body (HTML):
A tribute to NYC's artsy downtown district with urban sophistication and artistic edge. Opening with crisp mandarin and pink pepper, moving into cashmeran and violet, settling into sandalwood, patchouli, and musk. Downtown elegance captured.

Top Notes: Mandarin, Pink Pepper
Heart Notes: Cashmeran, Violet
Base Notes: Sandalwood, Patchouli, Musk
Tags: woody, floral, unisex, urban, artistic, season:spring, season:summer, origin:usa, event:daytime, event:evening-out

Title: Parfums de Marly Althair
Body (HTML):
A gourmand masterpiece named after one of the brightest stars in the sky. Opening with tropical passionfruit and bergamot, developing into praline and heliotrope, settling into vanilla, tonka bean, and white musk. Sweet sophistication perfected.

Top Notes: Passionfruit, Bergamot
Heart Notes: Praline, Heliotrope
Base Notes: Vanilla, Tonka Bean, White Musk
Tags: sweet, gourmand, masculine, evening, luxurious, season:fall, season:winter, origin:france, event:evening-out, event:date-night

Title: Parfums de Marly Pegasus
Body (HTML):
A majestic fragrance inspired by the mythical winged horse, noble and utterly captivating. Opening with bitter almond and bergamot, unfolding into lavender and jasmine, landing on a powerful base of vanilla, sandalwood, and amber.

Top Notes: Bitter Almond, Bergamot, Heliotrope
Heart Notes: Lavender, Jasmine
Base Notes: Vanilla, Sandalwood, Amber, Guaiac Wood
Tags: almond, vanilla, masculine, evening, signature, season:spring, season:fall, origin:france, event:office, event:date-night
